# Optional Python runtime dependencies for Azas perception and voice paths.
#
# Install into the same Python environment used by ROS 2 Humble.
# Review licenses before product use. In particular, Ultralytics is AGPL-3.0
# unless an enterprise license is used.

# Fast MVP tumbler detector path: azas_perception/yolo_tumbler_detector_node.py
ultralytics

# Open-vocabulary mask fallback: azas_perception/grounded_sam2_tumbler_mask_node.py
# Upstream install guidance currently uses a Git URL, not a stable PyPI-only path.
git+https://github.com/luca-medeiros/lang-segment-anything.git

# Lecture-compatible STT path: azas_voice/stt_node.py
SpeechRecognition
PyAudio

# Offline/local STT candidates for later replacement of Google Web Speech.
vosk
openai-whisper
